expected.observable_behavior: Parsed value is_object() == true, is_array() == false, is_null() == false, is_number() == false, is_string() == false, is_boolean() == false.
object["one"].as_f64() == Some(1.0); object["Two"].as_f64() == Some(2.0); object["tHree"].as_f64() == Some(3.0); object["One"].is_null() == true
after detach, removed value is the item; array length decreases.
dump() returns a compact JSON string without whitespace.
pretty(4) returns a formatted string with newlines and indentation.
object.has_key("key") == false; removed value is correct.
